text:
Once upon a time in a quiet village nestled between rolling hills and emerald forests, there lived an old oak tree named Oscar. Oscar was more than just an old oak tree; he was the keeper of wisdom and tales from ages past. Children would come to him with questions and listen intently for his sage advice.

One sunny afternoon, a young squirrel named Benny came to Oscar with a bubbling request. Benny was determined to discover an ancient secret so powerful that it could turn the tides of any battle. With careful encouragement from Oscar, Benny embarked on his quest through the forest’s underbrush.

After days of exploration, Benny stumbled upon a hidden glade where the trees whispered ancient secrets. Among these were words said to grant unparalleled leadership to the bravest among them. Benny realized he had what it took—courage, determination, and a heart ready to lead—so he returned to Oscar with a proposition. He wanted to be the one to deliver the magic words.

The next spring
